Who we are

About Baysoom

Baysoom Mebel's specializes in smart furniture and functional upgrades designed to enhance modern living environments. Our solutions integrate technology, functionality, and modern design to improve usability, guest experience, and visual appeal.

We focus particularly on rental properties, serviced apartments, and hospitality spaces — delivering practical upgrades that help properties stand out and provide a better experience for guests and residents.

6+
Solution lines
100%
Design-first
Smart
Tech upgrades
What we offer

Core Solutions

Six complete product lines — smart bedroom and living room furniture, connected dining, bathroom technology, and security systems. Every solution designed to elevate any property.

01 — Bedroom

Smart Beds

Multi-function beds with integrated speakers, storage, charging ports, massage, and ambient lighting.

02 — Living Room

Smart Sofas

LED sectional sofas with built-in lighting, charging, and premium aesthetic appeal.

03 — Tables

Smart Tables

Coffee and side tables with LED systems and premium glass surfaces.

04 — Dining

Smart Dining Sets

Multifunctional dining tables with concealed compartments and luxury stone surfaces.

05 — Bathroom

Smart Toilets

Intelligent toilet systems with auto-lid, bidet, LED lighting, and heated seating.

06 — Security

Smart Locks

Keyless entry with fingerprint, PIN, and camera recognition for rental access control.

Real use cases

Applications in Rental & Hospitality Spaces

01

Airbnb Living Room Upgrade

Smart LED sofas and coffee tables improve guest convenience and create a memorable first impression that translates into better reviews and higher rates.

02

Bedroom Enhancement

Smart beds with integrated speakers, lighting, storage, and safe create modern sleeping environments guests remember and return to.

03

Dining & Bathroom Premium

Smart dining sets and intelligent toilet systems bring luxury hospitality features to residential and short-term rental properties.

04

Modern Property Differentiation

Combined smart upgrades across all rooms help properties stand out in competitive rental markets, commanding premium pricing.

Dining solutions

Smart Dinner Sets

Our smart dining tables redefine the experience with concealed storage compartments, integrated serving trays, luxury sintered stone surfaces, and optional LED elements — designed as a focal point of the guest experience.

Available for upscale Airbnb properties, serviced apartments, and residential dining rooms.

Concealed center-opening compartments
Luxury sintered stone & glass surfaces
Integrated bottle & serving storage
Premium chair sets available
Multiple sizes for any dining space
Bathroom solutions

Smart Toilets

Intelligent toilet systems that bring five-star hospitality to any bathroom. Automatic lid, integrated bidet with adjustable pressure and temperature, LED ambient lighting, heated seating, and self-cleaning functions.

One of the most talked-about features in short-term rental reviews — a premium upgrade that dramatically elevates guest perception.

Automatic lid open / close sensor
Integrated bidet with temperature control
LED ambient bowl lighting
Heated seat with adjustable settings
Remote control & self-cleaning system
Wall-mounted remote included
Security solutions

Smart Lock Systems

Keyless, modern access control for rental properties, Airbnb units, and residential spaces. Fingerprint, PIN code, face recognition, and camera-enabled models — professional installation included.

Compatible with existing doors and gate systems. No major renovation required.

Fingerprint + PIN + face recognition
Built-in camera for identification
Compatible with doors & gate grilles
Ideal for Airbnb remote check-in/out
Professional installation included
For professionals

Designed for Property Managers

Complete smart upgrades across every room — bedroom, living room, dining room, bathroom, and entry — delivered and installed by our team.

Upgrade furnished units with minimal disruption
Improve guest experience and review scores
Enhance visual appeal for listing photography
Increase perceived property value
Modernize rental environments affordably
Enable keyless access for remote management
